description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, wearing a casual short-sleeve t-shirt featuring a graphic design on the chest. He is dressed in fitted pants and low-top sneakers with visible soles. The figure has a neatly groomed beard and mustache, and is wearing dark sunglasses. His hair is closely cropped, and his arms hang naturally at his sides with fingers slightly spread. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed, urban pedestrian ready for everyday activities.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a graphic t-shirt, fitted pants, sneakers, sunglasses, and a close-cropped hairstyle, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the graphic t-shirt, sunglasses, facial hair, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, beard, and the fit of the t-shirt and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, plain back of the t-shirt, and the shape of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and fitted pants with low-top sneakers and sunglasses
